message: hey dad, just got home from work, how was your day?
it was good, just mowed the lawn...
yeah, that's cool, can you send me a pic of the lawn?
sorry cant send pic, my phone is being stubborn...
try restarting your phone and see if that helps
oh no, what happened to the car?
it broke down on the way back from the grocery store, had to get it towed to Joe's Auto Repair...
glad you got it to joe's, hope it's not a big repair
just tried restarting phone, still not sendingp ics...
don't worry about the pic, just glad to hear Luna is safe...
at least she's safe, right?
need to mow the lawn this weekend ,weather looks perfect!
dude, mowing the lawn can wait, let's catch our bretah first 😂
don't be too hard on Luna, she's just being a cat...
finally got the weeds out of the garden, now i need a beer 💀
Wish I had your energy, now I'm off to oil the lawn mower!
nice job getting the weeds out, btw, how's your back?
ugh, anyway, just got to the daily grind and they're out of hazelnut, what's up with that?
Guess they must be getting popular or something... Love, Dad
lol that's not the reason they're always out of hazelnut
